title: The SURYAR
overview: The world's major cities are launching large, systematic urban redevelopment projects, and are implementing them with incredible speed. This policy destroys entire neighbourhoods in cities and turns public spaces into cement. The Grand Paris project is one of these. Through the eyes of Kuomars Jahanzad, a Kurdish refugee who participated in the Yellow Vests movement, this documentary shows the consequences of these urban planning policies carried out by successive governments.
